pain_point_label: Official Receipt Issuance & Clearance Certification Bottleneck

matches.match_rationale: Physical official receipts are handwritten or printed documents. OCR and form extraction can digitize receipt copies, payment vouchers, and historical receipt pads into structured records.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A receipt digitization pipeline where staff photograph or scan issued receipts; OCR extracts receipt number, amount, student ID, and date — auto-posting to the finance ledger and flagging mismatches.

matches.match_rationale: Receipt series completeness audits — detecting gaps, duplicates, or out-of-sequence numbers — are precisely an anomaly detection problem over structured sequential data.
matches.opportunity_sketch: An automated receipt series integrity monitor that continuously checks for gaps, duplicates, or numbering anomalies across all campuses, generating a compliance report on demand.

matches.match_rationale: Clearance certification is a multi-step workflow: verify all invoices paid, confirm all receipts issued, check outstanding balances across systems, then generate and certify the clearance document.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A clearance automation agent triggered by a graduation or transfer request: it queries payment history, receipt issuance log, and balance data, resolves discrepancies, and either auto-generates the clearance certificate or routes to a human.

matches.match_rationale: Clearance certificates and BIR-compliant acknowledgment letters are structured documents with fixed content patterns. Text generation can produce these on demand from structured data.
matches.opportunity_sketch: A document generation module that produces clearance certificates, official acknowledgment letters, and audit-ready receipt summaries from structured payment data.
